title: Revision Day 1 — All Subjects Problem Practice

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Find the inverse of the matrix $\begin{bmatrix} 2 & 3 \\ 1 & 5 \end{bmatrix}$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Evaluate: $\begin{vmatrix} 1 & 1 & 1 \\ a & b & c \\ bc & ca & ab \end{vmatrix}$.
questions.hint: Perform column operations: $C_2 \rightarrow C_2-C_1$, $C_3 \rightarrow C_3-C_1$, then factor.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Show that the matrix $A = \frac{1}{3}\begin{bmatrix} -1 & 2 & -2 \\ -2 & 1 & 2 \\ 2 & 2 & 1 \end{bmatrix}$ is orthogonal, i.e. $AA^T = A^T A = I_3$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Find the equation of the straight line which passes through the point of intersection of the lines $2x + 3y = 5$ and $3x + 5y = 7$ and makes equal intercepts on the coordinate axes.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Find the equation of the circle which touches both the axes and passes through $(6,3)$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Find the length of latus rectum of the parabola $y^2 + 48x = 0$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Evaluate $\int \frac{e^x(1+x)}{\cos^2(x e^x)} \, dx$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Evaluate: $\int \frac{x-1}{(x-3)(x+2)} \, dx$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Evaluate: $\int_0^{\pi/2} \frac{\sin x}{\sin x + \cos x} \, dx$.
questions.hint: Use $I = \int_0^{\pi/2} f(x) dx = \int_0^{\pi/2} f(\pi/2 - x) dx$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Find the area bounded by the parabola $y^2 = 4x$ above x-axis and ordinate at $x = 2$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Solve: $\frac{d^2y}{dx^2} - 10 \frac{dy}{dx} + 25y = 0$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Solve: $\frac{d^2y}{dx^2} - 10 \frac{dy}{dx} + 25y = e^{5x}$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Solve: $\frac{dy}{dx} = \frac{x}{y}$.
questions.hint: Separate: $y dy = x dx$, integrate: $y^2 = x^2 + c$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Solve: $\frac{dy}{dx} + 2xy = x$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: If $z = x^2y + xy^2$, find $\frac{\partial z}{\partial x}$ and $\frac{\partial z}{\partial y}$.
questions.hint: $\frac{\partial z}{\partial x} = 2xy + y^2$, $\frac{\partial z}{\partial y} = x^2 + 2xy$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: If $u = \frac{x^2}{y}$, verify Euler's theorem.
questions.hint: $u$ is homogeneous of degree 1, so $x\frac{\partial u}{\partial x}+y\frac{\partial u}{\partial y} = u$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Calculate mean and standard deviation from the following data: Size: 6,7,8,9,10,11,12; Frequency: 3,5,9,13,8,5,4.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Three coins are tossed. Find the probability of getting at least one tail.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: There are two identical urns containing 4 white and 3 red balls; 3 white and 7 red balls. An urn is chosen at random and a ball is drawn. Find the probability that the ball is white. If the ball drawn is white, what is the probability it is from the first urn?

questions.subject: physics
questions.question: Two point charges of +5μC and -3μC are placed 10 cm apart. Find the force between them. (k = 9×10⁹ Nm²/C²)

questions.subject: physics
questions.question: Three capacitors of 2μF, 3μF, and 6μF are connected in series. Find the equivalent capacitance. If connected in parallel, find the equivalent capacitance.

questions.subject: physics
questions.question: A copper wire of length 2 m and diameter 0.5 mm has resistance 0.2 Ω. Find the resistivity of copper.

questions.subject: physics
questions.question: A convex lens has radii of curvature 20 cm and 30 cm. The refractive index of the lens material is 1.5. Find the focal length.

questions.subject: physics
questions.question: Calculate the energy of the electron in the first excited state of hydrogen atom.

questions.subject: physics
questions.question: A particle executes SHM with amplitude 0.1 m and time period 2 seconds. Find its maximum velocity and maximum acceleration.

questions.subject: physics
questions.question: The equation of a progressive wave is $y = 0.05 \sin(100\pi t - 0.4\pi x)$ m. Find the wavelength, frequency, and velocity.
questions.hint: Compare with $y = A \sin(\omega t - kx)$, $k = \frac{2\pi}{\lambda}$, $\omega = 2\pi f$, $v = f\lambda$.

questions.subject: mechanics
questions.question: A simply supported beam of length 6 m carries two point loads of 24 kN each at 2 m and 4 m from left support, and a uniformly distributed load of 12 kN/m over the entire span. Determine the reactions at the supports.
questions.hint: Take moments about one support to find the other reaction.

questions.subject: mechanics
questions.question: A body of weight 500 N is lying on a rough plane inclined at an angle of 25° with the horizontal. It is supported by an effort (P) parallel to the plane. Determine the minimum value of P, for which the equilibrium can exist, if the angle of friction is 20°.
questions.hint: When the body is on the verge of moving down, $P = W \sin \theta - \mu W \cos \theta$.

questions.subject: mechanics
questions.question: Find the centroid of an I-section having top flange 160mm × 20mm, web 80mm × 30mm, and bottom flange 200mm × 10mm.
questions.hint: Divide section into rectangles and use $\bar{y} = \frac{\sum A_i y_i}{\sum A_i}$.

questions.subject: mechanics
questions.question: The law of wheel and axle machine is $P = 0.2W + 50$. The diameter of wheel is 600 mm and radius of axle is 50 mm. Find (a) Mechanical Advantage, (b) Effort required to lift a load of 2000 N, (c) Maximum Efficiency, (d) Maximum Mechanical Advantage.

questions.subject: mechanics
questions.question: A motorist rushing at 15 m/s finds a block on the road 40 m ahead. He applies brakes to stop the car within 5 m of the block. Calculate (i) retardation and (ii) time required to stop the car.
questions.hint: Use $v^2 = u^2 + 2as$ to find a, then $v = u + at$ to find t.

questions.subject: mechanics
questions.question: A particle is projected at an angle 45° with the horizontal with velocity 150 m/s. Determine: (i) maximum height, (ii) horizontal range, (iii) time of flight.

questions.subject: feee
questions.question: A coil of resistance 10Ω and inductance 0.1 H is connected in series with a capacitor 10μF. This combination is connected to 240V, 50Hz supply. Calculate (i) impedance, (ii) current, (iii) power factor, (iv) power consumed.

questions.subject: feee
questions.question: A single phase 50Hz transformer has 50 and 250 turns on low voltage and high voltage windings respectively. If low voltage winding is connected to 230V, 50Hz supply, calculate (i) peak value of flux and (ii) flux density in the core with net cross-sectional area 250 cm². (iii) Also determine the low voltage winding current when current in the other winding is 100A.

questions.subject: feee
questions.question: An inverting amplifier uses an op-amp with $R_f = 100k\Omega$ and $R_i = 10k\Omega$. Find the voltage gain. If input voltage is 0.5V, find output voltage.

questions.subject: feee
questions.question: A non-inverting amplifier has $R_f = 100k\Omega$ and $R_i = 10k\Omega$. Find the voltage gain. If input voltage is 0.5V, find output voltage.

questions.subject: feee
questions.question: A resistor of 6Ω is connected in series with a parallel combination of 15Ω and 10Ω resistors. The whole circuit is connected across a 30V supply. Determine current flowing through 15Ω resistor.
questions.hint: Find equivalent resistance, total current, then current divider rule.

questions.subject: feee
questions.question: An iron ring of diameter 0.2 m and cross-sectional area 10 cm² is wound with 250 turns of wire. If the flux density in the core is to be 1 T and relative permeability of iron is 500, what is the exciting current required? Also determine the self-inductance.

questions.subject: it
questions.question: Convert: (i) $(21C)_{16}$ to Octal number (ii) $(34.25)_{10}$ to Binary number.
questions.hint: Convert hex to decimal first then to octal. For decimal, separate integer and fractional parts.

questions.subject: it
questions.question: Subtract 25-16 using 2's complement method.
questions.hint: Find 2's complement of subtrahend and add.

questions.subject: it
questions.question: Simplify the Boolean expression: $(X + Y)(X + \overline{Y})(\overline{X} + Z)$.

questions.subject: it
questions.question: Implement AND gate using only NOR gate.
questions.hint: NOR is universal, can be used to create AND.

questions.subject: evs
questions.question: What are the major causes of deforestation? List any three.

questions.subject: evs
questions.question: Define food chain and food web with examples.
questions.hint: Food chain is linear transfer of energy, food web is interconnected.

questions.subject: evs
questions.question: What are the different methods of biodiversity conservation?

questions.subject: evs
questions.question: List four major air pollutants and their sources.
questions.hint: CO, SO₂, NOx, particulate matter from vehicles, industries.

questions.subject: evs
questions.question: What is the objective of the Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1974?
questions.hint: To prevent and control water pollution and maintain water quality.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Evaluate: $\begin{vmatrix} 105 & 106 & 107 \\ 110 & 111 & 112 \\ 115 & 116 & 117 \end{vmatrix}$.
questions.hint: Rows are in AP, subtracting rows yields zero → determinant = 0.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Find the slope of the line $2x - 3y = 3$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Evaluate: $\int_0^1 e^{2x} \, dx$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Solve: $\frac{dy}{dx} = \frac{y^2}{x^2}$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: If $u = \log(x^3 + y^3 + z^3 - 3xyz)$, show that $\frac{\partial u}{\partial x} + \frac{\partial u}{\partial y} + \frac{\partial u}{\partial z} = \frac{3}{x+y+z}$.

questions.subject: maths
questions.question: Two dice are rolled. Find the probability that the sum of the numbers is 6.

questions.subject: physics
questions.question: A circular coil of radius 0.1 m carries a current of 5 A. Find the magnetic field at its center. (μ₀ = 4π×10⁻⁷ H/m)

questions.subject: physics
questions.question: Find the equivalent resistance of three resistors 2Ω, 3Ω, and 6Ω connected in parallel.

questions.subject: physics
questions.question: A coil of 100 turns has a magnetic flux of 0.02 Wb. If the flux is reduced to zero in 0.1 seconds, find the induced emf.

questions.subject: mechanics
questions.topic: Basics of Mechanics and Force System
questions.question: Two forces of magnitude 10 N and 15 N act at an angle of 60°. Find the magnitude and direction of the resultant.

questions.subject: mechanics
questions.question: Two forces of magnitude '2P' and 'P' act on a particle. If the first force be doubled and the second force is increased by 12 kN, the direction of their resultant remains unaltered. Find the value of P.
questions.hint: Use condition that the tangent of the angle of the resultant remains constant.

questions.subject: mechanics
questions.question: A load of 2 kN is to be lifted by a screw-jack, having threads of 10 mm pitch. The efficiency of the jack at load is 50%. Determine the effort applied at the end of the handle of 50 cm length.

questions.subject: mechanics
questions.question: Water from a tank of capacity 18000 litres is to be lifted in 20 minutes by a pump through a height of 12 m. If the efficiency of the pump is 65%, find the power of the pump. (1 litre = 1 kg)

questions.subject: feee
questions.question: A three-phase, star-connected AC motor draws 5.6 kW when the line voltage is 220 V and the line current is 18.2 A. Determine the power factor of the motor.

questions.subject: feee
questions.question: A silicon diode has a forward voltage drop of 0.7 V. If it is connected in series with a 1 kΩ resistor and a 5 V supply, find the current through the diode.
questions.hint: Voltage across resistor = 5 - 0.7 = 4.3 V, current = 4.3/1000 = 4.3 mA.

questions.subject: it
questions.question:
Write HTML code to create the following table:

| Animals | Birds | Fruits |
|---------|-------|--------|
| Cow | Parrot | Banana |
| Dog | Pigeon | Mango |
| Horse | Crow | Apple |
questions.hint: Use 2d arrays and the 20 and 3c/td> tags.

questions.subject: it
questions.question: Write a JavaScript program to find HCF (GCD) of two numbers.

questions.subject: it
questions.question: Write CSS to set the background color of a webpage to light blue and text color to dark blue.

questions.subject: evs
questions.question: What are the major causes of water scarcity?

questions.subject: evs
questions.question: Explain the 10% law of energy transfer in an ecosystem.
questions.hint: Only 10% of energy is transferred from one trophic level to the next.

questions.subject: evs
questions.question: What are biodiversity hotspots? Name two hotspots in India.
questions.hint: Regions with high species richness and endemism. Western Ghats, Eastern Himalayas.

questions.subject: evs
questions.question: What are the effects of noise pollution on human health?

questions.subject: evs
questions.question: What is the objective of the Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1981?
questions.hint: To prevent, control, and abate air pollution.
